cta.title: Have a high-scale mobile app idea or multiplatform project?
cta.description: Tell me about your product goals, architecture needs, or KMP/Flutter migration — I'll reply within one business day with a clear technical roadmap.

profile.title: Senior Mobile App Developer & Architect
profile.subtitle: Native Android • Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) • Compose Multiplatform (CMP) • Flutter
profile.bio: Senior Mobile App Developer with 6+ years of engineering experience shipping scalable production apps for HealthTech, FinTech, IoT, and E-commerce. Specialized in Native Android, Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Compose Multiplatform (CMP), and Flutter with Clean Architecture and MVI/MVVM design patterns.
profile.availability: Open for Senior Roles & Strategic Consulting

skills.title: Technical Arsenal
skills.subtitle: My professional toolkit across native and multiplatform ecosystems
skills.android: Native Android (Jetpack Compose, TV, Custom UI)
skills.tools: IoT, Payments & DevOps (Agora, Hardware SDKs, CI/CD)

home.description: I'm Muhammad Awais, a Senior Mobile Developer with 6+ years of experience engineering robust mobile systems. I specialize in Native Android (Kotlin/Java), Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Compose Multiplatform (CMP), and Flutter—maintaining a 99%+ crash-free rate across 25+ deployed applications.
home.processSubtitle: A pragmatic process built around shipping resilient, scalable code

01.title: Discovery & Scoping
01.body: A deep dive into scope, key platform requirements (Android, iOS, KMP, or Flutter), and clear engineering milestones.

02.title: Architecture First
02.body: Designing modular Clean Architecture—shared KMP business logic, predictable MVI/MVVM state management, and decoupled platform UI.

03.title: Iterative Build
03.body: Weekly production-grade builds you can install and test on physical devices, backed by CI/CD automation.

04.title: Ship & Scale
04.body: Store launch, release pipelines setup, crash reporting, and a comprehensive technical handover for long-term scalability.

home.feedbackSubtitle: What engineering leaders and founders say

contact.title: Contact
contact.headerTitle: Let's build your next mobile milestone.
contact.headerDesc: Reach out directly via email or connect on professional channels — I reply within one business day.

form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out — I read and respond to every inquiry promptly.
